note: Vectors from Reg B §1002.9 + CFPB Circulars 2022-03/2023-03. golden_hash empty until golden-parity --update.

vectors.name: four_fico_reasons_compliant
vectors.description: 4 specific FICO reason codes, all required fields present, credit report used: fully compliant notice.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Reg B §1002.9(a)(2)(i) (12 CFR Part 1002); ECOA 15 USC §1691c; FCRA §615(a) 15 USC §1681m; CFPB Circular 2022-03; CFPB Circular 2023-03
output_payload.table_source: CFPB Circular 2022-03 (Aug 2022); CFPB Circular 2023-03 (Sep 2023); 12 CFR §1002.9; 15 USC §1681m
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted. Do not enter real personal data.

vectors.name: vague_code_missing_fcra
vectors.description: Vague prohibited code (z_other) + missing FCRA §615(a) fields: 4 violations expected.

violations.message: Reason code 'z_other' at position 1 is a prohibited vague/checklist code under CFPB Circular 2023-03.
Credit report was used; notice must include CRA name, address, and phone number.
Credit report was used; notice must state right to free copy within 60 days.
Credit report was used; notice must state right to dispute inaccurate information with CRA.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Reg B §1002.9(a)(2)(i) (12 CFR Part 1002); ECOA 15 USC §1691c; FCRA §615(a) 15 USC §1681m; CFPB Circular 2022-03; CFPB Circular 2023-03
output_payload.table_source: CFPB Circular 2022-03 (Aug 2022); CFPB Circular 2023-03 (Sep 2023); 12 CFR §1002.9; 15 USC §1681m
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted. Do not enter real personal data.

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: Empty input returns finite zero-state (no reasons = 1 Reg B violation, compliance_score finite).

violations.message: Notice must state specific reasons for adverse action.
Notice must include creditor name and address.
Notice must state the action taken.
Notice must include the date of the action.
